name: Jim Zhou
title: Principal Software Development Engineer
summary: Principal SDE with ~5 years of experience building high-performance backend systems and cloud-native security infrastructure. Deep expertise in Go, Python, and distributed systems. Currently pivoting toward AI infrastructure — studying LLM serving, GPU inference optimization, and building hands-on projects in ML systems. Targeting Senior+ engineering roles at top tech companies, especially in AI-adjacent domains.

bullets: Mentored team of 5 engineers, conducted code reviews, and established engineering best practices
Built real-time threat detection engine using Go, processing network traffic at wire speed
Implemented distributed caching layer reducing API latency by 60%
